default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly check-in to discuss GrowthXLabs and Litebox project progress, including design updates and infrastructure setup.](https://fathom.video/share/9AaURxwmEqAKXRmDL5NzsiiTAVUKTXpT?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel attended a successful event, connecting with 100+ people and potential CMO clients](https://fathom.video/share/9AaURxwmEqAKXRmDL5NzsiiTAVUKTXpT?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Design updates for homepage and blog section were presented, with positive feedback](https://fathom.video/share/9AaURxwmEqAKXRmDL5NzsiiTAVUKTXpT?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [AWS account setup needed for project infrastructure transition](https://fathom.video/share/9AaURxwmEqAKXRmDL5NzsiiTAVUKTXpT?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
  - [Team transitions: Hernán on vacation for 2 weeks, new team member joining next week](https://fathom.video/share/9AaURxwmEqAKXRmDL5NzsiiTAVUKTXpT?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)

## Topics

### Recent Event Recap

  - [Marcel attended a large event, connecting with over 100 people](https://fathom.video/share/9AaURxwmEqAKXRmDL5NzsiiTAVUKTXpT?tab=summary&timestamp=22.0)
  - [Nearly 1000 attendees overall](https://fathom.video/share/9AaURxwmEqAKXRmDL5NzsiiTAVUKTXpT?tab=summary&timestamp=27.0)
  - [CMO branch event allowed meeting potential clients](https://fathom.video/share/9AaURxwmEqAKXRmDL5NzsiiTAVUKTXpT?tab=summary&timestamp=35.0)
  - [Scheduling oversight: Need better advance planning for such events](https://fathom.video/share/9AaURxwmEqAKXRmDL5NzsiiTAVUKTXpT?tab=summary&timestamp=46.0)

### Homepage Design Updates

  - ["How it Works" section illustrations completed](https://fathom.video/share/9AaURxwmEqAKXRmDL5NzsiiTAVUKTXpT?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Suggestion to include diverse employee avatars in illustrations](https://fathom.video/share/9AaURxwmEqAKXRmDL5NzsiiTAVUKTXpT?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Marcel to review and provide feedback via Figma comments](https://fathom.video/share/9AaURxwmEqAKXRmDL5NzsiiTAVUKTXpT?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### Blog Page Design Presentation

  - [New blog page design showcased:](https://fathom.video/share/9AaURxwmEqAKXRmDL5NzsiiTAVUKTXpT?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
      - [Featured article section](https://fathom.video/share/9AaURxwmEqAKXRmDL5NzsiiTAVUKTXpT?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
      - [Filterable article list](https://fathom.video/share/9AaURxwmEqAKXRmDL5NzsiiTAVUKTXpT?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
      - [Custom image templates for various content types (success stories, updates, interviews)](https://fathom.video/share/9AaURxwmEqAKXRmDL5NzsiiTAVUKTXpT?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [Positive feedback on design variety](https://fathom.video/share/9AaURxwmEqAKXRmDL5NzsiiTAVUKTXpT?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)
  - [Request for more template variations for versatile use (blog covers, slides, social images)](https://fathom.video/share/9AaURxwmEqAKXRmDL5NzsiiTAVUKTXpT?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
  - [Discussion on AI-generated images for blog covers](https://fathom.video/share/9AaURxwmEqAKXRmDL5NzsiiTAVUKTXpT?tab=summary&timestamp=503.0)

### Infrastructure Setup

  - [Current development on internal AWS account](https://fathom.video/share/9AaURxwmEqAKXRmDL5NzsiiTAVUKTXpT?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Need to set up client's own AWS environment for DNS and further development](https://fathom.video/share/9AaURxwmEqAKXRmDL5NzsiiTAVUKTXpT?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
  - [Marcel to create new AWS account and apply for credits](https://fathom.video/share/9AaURxwmEqAKXRmDL5NzsiiTAVUKTXpT?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)

### Development Progress

  - [Work continuing on approved sections](https://fathom.video/share/9AaURxwmEqAKXRmDL5NzsiiTAVUKTXpT?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)
  - [No current blockers reported](https://fathom.video/share/9AaURxwmEqAKXRmDL5NzsiiTAVUKTXpT?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to review and comment on Figma designs over the weekend](https://fathom.video/share/9AaURxwmEqAKXRmDL5NzsiiTAVUKTXpT?tab=summary&timestamp=771.0)
  - [Team to address Marcel's design feedback on Monday](https://fathom.video/share/9AaURxwmEqAKXRmDL5NzsiiTAVUKTXpT?tab=summary&timestamp=771.0)
  - [Marcel to set up AWS account and add Patricio as a user](https://fathom.video/share/9AaURxwmEqAKXRmDL5NzsiiTAVUKTXpT?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Prepare for team transition with Hernán's vacation and new member joining](https://fathom.video/share/9AaURxwmEqAKXRmDL5NzsiiTAVUKTXpT?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
  - [Continue development work on approved sections](https://fathom.video/share/9AaURxwmEqAKXRmDL5NzsiiTAVUKTXpT?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)

action_items.description: Review illustrations in Figma file, leave comments on "How it works" section
Review blog page design in Figma, provide feedback
Set up AWS account, apply for credits, add Patricio as user
